modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with Directory Image Management causing server errors

full_description_text:  
I'm having trouble with the Directory Image Management app. It keeps throwing a server error and pictures just aren't showing up at all. It's really frustrating because the functionality isn't working correctly, and I can't figure out why.
short_description: Issues with Directory Image Management causing server errors
description: I'm having trouble with the Directory Image Management app. It keeps throwing a server error and pictures just aren't showing up at all. It's really frustrating because the functionality isn't working correctly, and I can't figure out why.
